mapper.sql: a.id as id ,a.exam_id as examId ,a.kecheng_id as kechengId ,a.yonghu_id as yonghuId ,a.answer_snapshot as answerSnapshot ,a.question_snapshot as questionSnapshot ,a.auto_score as autoScore ,a.manual_score as manualScore ,a.final_score as finalScore ,a.pass_status as passStatus ,a.record_status as recordStatus ,a.start_time as startTime ,a.submit_time as submitTime ,a.check_time as checkTime ,a.check_remark as checkRemark ,a.attempt_no as attemptNo ,a.create_time as createTime
